Battleship
Class Player

java.lang.Object
  Battleship.Player

public class Player
extends java.lang.Object

Constructor Summary
Player(java.lang.String name)
          Constructs a player with a name, a ship board and a torpedo board
 
Method Summary
static void clearScreen()
           
 java.lang.String getName()
          Just a getter for getting the name of the player.
 boolean hasLost()
          Returns bool based on whether the player's shipboard doesnt have any ships left.
 void placeShips(java.util.Scanner scan)
          Calls the place ship method for all 3 ships.
 void printBoards()
          Just prints the boards of the player.
 void takeTurn(Player enemy, java.util.Scanner scan)
          Takes in the enemy player and a scanner object.
 
Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

Player

public Player(java.lang.String name)
Constructs a player with a name, a ship board and a torpedo board

Method Detail

clearScreen

public static void clearScreen()

getName

public java.lang.String getName()
Just a getter for getting the name of the player. Used for CURRENT_PLAYER logic in the driver

hasLost

public boolean hasLost()
Returns bool based on whether the player's shipboard doesnt have any ships left.

placeShips

public void placeShips(java.util.Scanner scan)
Calls the place ship method for all 3 ships.

printBoards

public void printBoards()
Just prints the boards of the player.

takeTurn

public void takeTurn(Player enemy,
                     java.util.Scanner scan)
Takes in the enemy player and a scanner object. modifies the enemy's shipboard and the player's torpedoBoard.
